title: `podman port` omits newline
body:
> /kind bug


**Description**
podman omits newline in output from `podman port` command

```
[ec2-user@ip-10-50-0-57 ~]$ sudo podman port registry 5000
0.0.0.0:5000[ec2-user@ip-10-50-0-57 ~]$ 
```

**Output of `podman version`:**

from copr repo 
```
[ec2-user@ip-10-50-0-57 ~]$ rpm -q podman
podman-0.4.4-git9b457e3.el7.centos.x86_64
[ec2-user@ip-10-50-0-57 ~]$ 
[ec2-user@ip-10-50-0-57 ~]$ podman version
Version:       0.4.4-dev
Go Version:    go1.8.3
OS/Arch:       linux/amd64

```
